items.title: Influencer Marketing
items.description: We have a team of 50+ specialists to ideate, execute, and deliver the desired outcomes for brands.

items.title: Digital IPs
items.description: We develop original, creator-led shows for brands, to build stronger brand recall than short-form content. These IPs are built for entertainment, storytelling, and community engagement to help brands establish a deeper presence in the digital culture.

items.title: Talent Management
items.description: We exclusively represent 120+ powerhouse creators across all categories in the digital ecosystem backing them from rising stars to household names.
bullets: Nation-wide influence across all niches & audiences
